judge_scores.reasoning: A resposta identifica corretamente Augusto Aras como procurador-geral da República e situa a decisão em 2021, alinhando-se ao critério de correção específica.
Correctly identifies Augusto Aras as PGR and the year 2021, noting the reorganization that ended the Lava Jato task force.

The response correctly identifies Augusto Aras as Procurador-Geral da República, specifies the year 2021, and accurately describes the dissolution of the Lava Jato task force as part of a PGR restructuring, meeting all criteria for a score of 5.
